name: config-validator-tool
description: Validate IronClaw configuration and catch common issues

tools.name: config_validator
tools.description: Check environment variables, LLM model, database URL format, and file permissions. Returns detailed validation results.

check.description: Which check to run: 'env' for environment variables only, 'full_report' for complete report

output_schema.description: JSON array of check results or formatted text report
